criteria.name: README with setup and execution instructions
criteria.evidence: README.md exists with Parks Canada context, pip install instructions, cleaning.py/analysis.ipynb usage, OSEMN description, key outputs listed, repository structure.

criteria.name: cleaning.py pipeline entrypoint
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py at repo root, importable, main() callable, --output-dir configurable (default data/processed/), logs stations/rows, checks raw data dir existence with clear error.

criteria.name: analysis.ipynb with documented narrative
criteria.evidence: Notebook has only 4 code cells, all import-only with print statements. Zero visualizations (no plt/plot/scatter/hist/figure calls). CODE[2] is a placeholder referencing external notebook. CODE[3] just imports modules. Spec requires at least one visualization per section (EDA, redundancy, FWI, uncertainty) and no placeholder sections.

criteria.name: Full FWI chain attempted
criteria.evidence: fwi.py implements only FFMC, DMC, DC (moisture codes). Missing: ISI (initial_spread_index), BUI (buildup_index), and final FWI (fire_weather_index). The spec requires the full chain FFMC -> DMC -> DC -> ISI -> BUI -> FWI. Only 3 of 6 steps exist.

criteria.name: Smoke test for deliverables
criteria.evidence: tests/test_deliverables.py covers cleaning import/main, notebook JSON validity, README content. All tests pass (86 passed).

summary: REJECT: 3/5 criteria pass, 2 fail. AC-DLV-3 fails because analysis.ipynb contains only import statements with zero visualizations — no plots, charts, or analytical output despite spec requiring one visualization per section. AC-DLV-4 fails because the FWI chain is incomplete: only moisture codes (FFMC, DMC, DC) are implemented; the remaining half of the chain (ISI, BUI, FWI) is entirely absent from fwi.py.
